commit_message:
Axi Stream timing infrastructure Axi Stream timing infrastructure Included two IPs allowing to batch a user-selectable number of frames together, and to measure the start-of-frame and end-of-frame times between several channels.

### Description
This contribution adds two IPs:
- AxiStreamBatchingFifo.vhd
- AxiStreamTimer.vhd

AxiStreamBatchingFifo is meant to accumulate a user-defined number of frames to then output them continuously with no pauses. This is important to smooth out streams
